---
title: "Overview"
---

# Overview

Air Analyzer is a wearable embedded system for monitoring breathing-related activity.

The project is based on a microcontroller architecture and focuses on real-time acquisition, signal handling, and firmware organization.

## Objectives

- Acquire data from the selected sensor.
- Process the acquired signal on the microcontroller.
- Detect useful information related to breathing activity.
- Manage the firmware using an interrupt-based approach.
- Provide clear and reproducible documentation.
